name: Fig Fruit Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 6 x 10 x 3-inch loaf pan. Line with waxed paper and butter generously again.
2. Set oven to 250 degrees F (120 C).
3. Cover figs with very hot water, and let stand 10 minutes. Drain.
4. Snip off stems of figs. Cut figs, cherries, and pineapple into tiny bits.
5. Add chopped nuts and half the sifted flour to the fruit mixture. Mix lightly.
6. Sift remaining flour, salt, baking powder, cinnamon, allspice, cloves, and almond extract together.
7. Cream shortening and sugar until light. Beat in egg yolks, melted chocolate, brandy or water, and vanilla.
8. Gradually mix in the dry ingredients alternately with the wet ingredients.
9. Pour batter into prepared pan.
10. Bake for about 3 to 4 hours at a slow oven temperature of 250 F (120 C).
11. Place a pan of hot water in the bottom of the oven during baking.
12. When cooled, brush top with hot corn syrup and decorate with figs, candied fruit, and nuts before serving.
